name: superpipelines
description: Design, generate, and run multi-agent AI pipelines — scope-aware, multi-pipeline, spec-driven, write/review-isolated. Codex App/CLI target (Tier 1d: native parallel subagents, up to 6 concurrent).

interface.shortDescription: Design and run multi-agent AI pipelines.
interface.longDescription: Spec-driven, write/review-isolated multi-agent orchestration across Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, and Cursor/Windsurf/Cline.
